# Northstar Food Service Looker benchmark

This fictional LookML project follows Google's documented project file conventions: one model file, one view file containing six views, and one version-controlled dashboard file. It is not a customer export or evidence from a production Looker instance.

Use it to verify deterministic LookML parsing and the reviewed Looker-to-Omni workflow. A high score is not proof of query-result parity, access-filter equivalence, PDT behavior, or visual fidelity; those still require validation and human branch review.
